positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a whimsical mountain range formed by glowing geometric crystal structures and connected by flowing bioluminescent vines. The scene should feature a central, majestic 'Zen Tree' with glowing roots that descend into an ethereal mist. Style: Highly detailed line art merged with bold, flat-color graphic design (neo-geometric aesthetic). Composition: Perfectly symmetrical, centered, designed to wrap around curved material. Color Palette: Deep indigo, vibrant cyan, electric lime green, and soft pearl white accents. Lighting: Dramatic backlighting to emphasize glowing edges and sharp silhouettes. Aspect details: Crisp lines, solid vectors, suitable for screen printing, high contrast, no gradients needed.
negative: photorealistic, painting, drawing, sketch, blur, grainy, watermark, signature, text, logo, messy, cluttered, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, out of focus
